commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'mkdir -p ~/workspace/yanxi/stage3-nixl && echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage3-nixl/nixl-build-probe.yaml && wc -l ~/workspace/yanxi/stage3-nixl/nixl-build-probe.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pod nixl-build-probe -o wide 2>&1'
